message.content:
The CRT/terminal glitch effect (orange/ember pixelated glyphs, scanlines) is **not clearly visible** behind the text in the contact section’s dark mode. The background appears too dark, causing the subtle glitch elements to blend into the overall dark theme and lose their distinctiveness.  

The text remains **readable** (due to sufficient contrast between the text and the dark background), but the glitch effect is underpowered—either too dim or overwhelmed by the dark mode’s overall darkness, so it fails to stand out as intended.
